div.head: Mr. Mizner to Mr. Blaine.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Guatemala, August 1, 1890.

div.p: Minister Mizner telegraphs from Menton to Minister Ryan, to be communicated to the Secretary of State, that he is in direct communication with San José, both by telegraph and railroad, and can communicate with naval officers there, the distance being about 70 miles. Telegraph lines do not pass through San José, except the branch from Menton, which latter place is headquarters.
